name: Talked to insurance already after injury in Boise, messed up?

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance already after injury in Boise, messed up?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Possibly; recorded statements used against you—stop communicating.**[1]

Adjusters minimize claims; avoid admitting fault or downplaying.

- Request all in writing.
- Lawyer handles talks.
- Preserve rights.

Switch to attorney rep now.
